hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qiE "\.env(\.[a-zA-Z_]+)*$" ; then echo "BLOCK: Do not edit .env files directly. Use environment-specific tooling or ask the user first." && exit 1; fi; if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qiE "(package-lock\.json|pnpm-lock\.yaml|yarn\.lock|bun\.lockb)" ; then echo "BLOCK: Do not edit lock files directly. Run the package manager install command instead." && exit 1; fi; exit 0'
bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$"; then cd "$PROJECT_DIR" && npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0'
